_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: In contrast, no increase in proliferation was observed following Nf1 inactivation in CTX astroglial cells
details: No increase in proliferation observed following Nf1 inactivation in cortical astroglial cells
